title: Projects and Implementations
text: Below is a selection of projects developed under agile methodologies, focused on solving business problems through Generative AI and data analytics.

title: Projects and Implementations
text:
Generative AI & Agents




Intelligent Help Desk (CENACE)
Technical Support Optimization with Private AI
System designed for the National Energy Control Center. It solves the need to automate incident classification and suggest technical solutions without exposing sensitive data to the public cloud.
Key Points:

Implementation of Open-Source models (Gemma/Ollama) for total data privacy.
RAG architecture for querying internal technical manuals.
Persistence of history and sessions in MongoDB.


Python LangChain Ollama FastAPI  Read Documentation →







Product Recommender (CT)
Real-Time Sales and Recommendation System
Advanced chatbot for hardware suggestions. Overcomes the challenge of connecting a massive MySQL catalog with a semantic search engine, managing dynamic prices and stock.
Key Points:

Complex ETL pipeline to synchronize MySQL with Vector Stores (FAISS).
“Mixed Content” architecture solution via PHP Proxy.
User moderation system and custom JS widget.


Python MySQL Docker/Podman JavaScript  Read Documentation →







Financial Chatbot (Salsas Castillo)
Sales and Financial Reports Assistant
Conversational solution deployed on Telegram for executives and the sales force. Allows natural language queries over transactional databases and internal regulations.
Key Points:

Orchestration of SQL Tools for real-time sales queries.
Automated generation of PDF Reports with AI analysis.
Native integration with Telegram API and audio transcription (Whisper).


Python PostgreSQL OpenAI API Telegram  Read Documentation →

title: Projects and Implementations
text:
Data Engineering




ETL & Data Engineering (Frutal)
Data Architecture Modernization
Design of a robust pipeline to migrate a legacy ERP system (HFSQL) to a modern Data Lake, resolving critical driver incompatibilities.
Key Points:

Solution to the “Stack Smashing” error by isolating processes in Python.
Containerization with Podman to unify development (Windows) and production (Linux) environments.
Storage and read optimization by converting to Parquet format.


Python Podman HFSQL Parquet  Read Documentation →

title: Projects and Implementations
text:
Data Science & Analytics




Customer Analytics (CT)
From Analysis to Production
Customer Analytics platform built for CT Internacional. It covers everything from RFM segmentation and identifying association rules (Market Basket), to the deployment of a daily ETL pipeline and an interactive dashboard.
Key Points:

K-Means (Segmentation) and FP-Growth (Market Basket) models.
Modular ETL pipeline persisted in Parquet.
Operational dashboard built with FastAPI, DuckDB, and Plotly.


Python Scikit-Learn FastAPI DuckDB  Read Documentation →

title: Data Science & AI Portfolio
text:
I am Ángel Alberto Merino Cedeño, a Master’s student in Data Science specializing in the development of Generative AI Systems, RAG Chatbots, and Data Architectures.
Here you will find detailed technical documentation on my most recent implementations.

View Projects → About Me →

title: About Me
text:
I am a professional passionate about the intersection between engineering and data science. Currently, I am pursuing a Master’s Degree in Data Science at the Universidad de Sonora, focusing on Natural Language Processing (NLP) and the development of Large Language Models (LLMs).
My experience combines the analytical foundation of chemical engineering with modern software development and data analysis tools.

title: About Me
text:
Education


Master’s Degree in Data Science | Universidad de Sonora


August 2023 - Present

Focus on Python, SQL, NoSQL databases, ETL processes, machine learning models, neural networks, NLP, and time series analysis.



Bachelor’s Degree in Chemical Engineering | Universidad de Sonora


August 2018 - June 2023

Skills in process simulation and optimization (MATLAB, ASPEN HYSYS).

title: About Me
text:
Professional Experience


Data Scientist | CT Internacional


February 2025 - Present

Development of an agentic model for advanced hardware recommendations and automated sales. Implementation of RAG architecture with LangChain and OpenAI for dynamic inventory, pricing, and technical guide queries.



Data Scientist | DARIG – Consultores (Salsas Castillo)


March 2025 - Feb 2026

Implementation of an MCP (Model Context Protocol) for sales analysis and business KPIs. Design of function-calling agents (SQL) integrated into Telegram for automated PDF report generation.



Data Engineer | DARIG – Consultores (Frutal)


October 2025 - Feb 2026

Development of Windows/Linux ETL pipelines for migrating legacy databases (HFSQL) to Data Lakes in Parquet format using Podman containers.



Data Scientist | National Energy Control Center (CENACE)


May 2024 - Feb 2025

Development of chatbots based on RAG systems to assist IT engineers. Integration of ticket classification systems to improve response efficiency.
